title: SdkGeneration
description: Represents an SDK generation job in the Sideko platform, tracking the status and output of generating a client SDK from an OpenAPI specification.

id.description: Unique identifier of the SDK generation job

projectId.description: Identifier of the parent API project

versionId.description: Identifier of the API version used for SDK generation

language.description: Target programming language for the generated SDK

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the SDK generation job

downloadUrl.description: URL to download the generated SDK archive when status is complete

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the generation job was queued

completedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the generation job finished (null if not yet complete)
